**Rewritten Query (PII Removed):**  
I am dedicated, organized, and a leadership individual with 15+ years of experience in Medical Transcription and have good knowledge of medical terminologies across all specialties. I have worked with physicians in specialties like Orthopedics, Cardiology, Gynecology, Psychiatry, Radiology, Internal Medicine, ENT, Family Medicine, Neurology, Dermatology, etc. I have good interpersonal skills, am an excellent team worker, keen to learn and develop new skills. I am reliable, dependable, and often seek new responsibilities within a wide range of employment areas. A multi-tasker who excels at supervising, transcription, and customer relationship management who regularly exceeds productivity to contribute to the success of the organization.

· Demonstrated strong editing skills to maintain quality and adherence to turnaround time.  
· Ensured excellent accuracy with good speed and maintained TAT.
